languages.text: {n}Гапраки — столь же древний род, сколь и Драйвстемы. Возможно, Камилла занервничала, представив себя на их месте.{/n}
{n}As a noble line, the Gapraks are no less ancient than the Drivestems. Perhaps imagining herself in their place has made Camilla anxious.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Гапраки — столь же древний род, сколь и Драйвстемы. Возможно, Камилла занервничала, представив себя на их месте.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}As a noble line, the Gapraks are no less ancient than the Drivestems. Perhaps imagining herself in their place has made Camilla anxious.{/n}
{n}As a noble line, the Gapraks are no less ancient than the Drivestems. Perhaps imagining herself in their place has made Camilla anxious.{/n}
{n}As a noble line, the Gapraks are no less ancient than the Drivestems. Perhaps imagining herself in their place has made Camilla anxious.{/n}

languages.text: {n}作为贵族血脉，贾帕克和德莱夫斯塔一样古老。也许是想到自己也有可能落到那种地步，卡米拉显得有些许不安。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As a noble line, the Gapraks are no less ancient than the Drivestems. Perhaps imagining herself in their place has made Camilla anxious.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}作为贵族血脉，贾帕克和德莱夫斯塔一样古老。也许是想到自己也有可能落到那种地步，卡米拉显得有些许不安。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La noble lignée des Gaprak est tout aussi ancienne que celle des Drivestem. Camilla est peut-être anxieuse en s'imaginant à leur place.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As a noble line, the Gapraks are no less ancient than the Drivestems. Perhaps imagining herself in their place has made Camilla anxious.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La noble lignée des Gaprak est tout aussi ancienne que celle des Drivestem. Camilla est peut-être anxieuse en s'imaginant à leur place.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Soylu bir aile olarak Gapraklar, Drivestemler kadar kadimdir. Belki de kendini onların yerine koymak, Camilla'yı endişelendirmiştir.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As a noble line, the Gapraks are no less ancient than the Drivestems. Perhaps imagining herself in their place has made Camilla anxious.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Soylu bir aile olarak Gapraklar, Drivestemler kadar kadimdir. Belki de kendini onların yerine koymak, Camilla'yı endişelendirmiştir.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los Gaprak son una casa noble tan antigua como los Drivestem. Tal vez al ponerse en su lugar Camilla se haya puesto nerviosa.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As a noble line, the Gapraks are no less ancient than the Drivestems. Perhaps imagining herself in their place has made Camilla anxious.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los Gaprak son una casa noble tan antigua como los Drivestem. Tal vez al ponerse en su lugar Camilla se haya puesto nerviosa.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Als Adelsgeschlecht sind die Gaprak nicht weniger alt als die Drivestems. Vielleicht hat der Gedanke, an ihrer Stelle zu sein, Camilla erschreckt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As a noble line, the Gapraks are no less ancient than the Drivestems. Perhaps imagining herself in their place has made Camilla anxious.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Als Adelsgeschlecht sind die Gaprak nicht weniger alt als die Drivestems. Vielleicht hat der Gedanke, an ihrer Stelle zu sein, Camilla erschreckt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ガプラク家は、ドライブステム家と同じくらい古い貴族の家系です。キャミラの不安は、ガプラク家の立場を想像した結果かもしれません。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As a noble line, the Gapraks are no less ancient than the Drivestems. Perhaps imagining herself in their place has made Camilla anxious.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ガプラク家は、ドライブステム家と同じくらい古い貴族の家系です。キャミラの不安は、ガプラク家の立場を想像した結果かもしれません。{/n}
